context._comment_design: BAP-PULL PAGINATION — the BAP issues this status request to fetch a specific page of the meter data collection. The 'pagination' tag group lives on message.tags (Beckn v2 Contract is a closed schema with additionalProperties:false, so it cannot host tags directly; Context is open but reserved for routing/transaction state; Message is open and is the right envelope for query-state tags). It carries the opaque pageCursor received in the previous on_status response (pageInfo.nextCursor) plus the collectionId that scopes the cursor. The BPP responds with the corresponding on_status page. To request the first page, omit the pageCursor item entirely (or send without a pagination tag); the BPP treats a missing cursor as page 0.

descriptor.name: IntelliGrid AMI Meter Data - Bengaluru Zone A - Q1 2026
